message.content:
Research recent news, orders, and corporate actions for Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd, an Indian EMS/defense-electronics company (NSE: VINNY, BSE: 542907) based in Mysore. Focus on 2025 and 2026.

Use WebSearch and WebFetch on moneycontrol.com, economictimes, business-standard, BSE announcements (bseindia.com), NSE announcements, trendlyne.com, and general news search.

Find and report with inline source URLs and DATES:
1. New orders/contracts won in 2025-2026 (especially defense, BEL, ISRO, aerospace, or export orders). Amounts if disclosed.
2. Capacity expansion plans / new plant / new facility announcements (e.g., new manufacturing unit, SMT lines).
3. Fundraising: any QIP, preferential allotment, warrants, rights issue, debt raise in 2025-2026. Amounts and pricing.
4. Corporate actions: stock splits, bonus issues, rights issues, warrant conversions, dividends.
5. Management commentary / guidance from recent quarterly results or concalls (FY2025, FY2026).
6. Any analyst/brokerage coverage, price targets, or recommendations.

Be precise on dates. Clearly FLAG anything that is a rumor/unconfirmed vs officially announced/confirmed. Return findings as a concise markdown section with source URLs. Do NOT write any files - return findings directly as text.

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

Based on the search results, here's what I found about Vinyas Innovative Technologies' capacity expansion plans:

Vinyas Innovative Technologies Limited, an Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) provider, plans to raise capital through a preferential allotment of 1,364,000 warrants. Following its successful SME IPO in late 2023, Vinyas is aggressively expanding its manufacturing footprint, investing in new SMT lines and enhancing its R&D capabilities.

The company is headquartered in Mysore, India, and utilizes high-speed SMT (Surface Mount Technology) lines and THT (Through-Hole Technology) to manufacture complex boards for precision instruments.

However, the search results do not contain specific details about a new plant or SMT facility expansion in Mysore scheduled for 2025. While the company is clearly pursuing capacity expansion with new SMT lines, the exact details of the 2025 facility expansion project you're asking about were not found in these search results.

Based on the search results, here's what I found regarding Vinyas Innovative Technologies' fundraising activities:

## Recent Fundraising (2025)

Vinyas Innovative Technologies Limited plans to raise capital through a preferential allotment of 1,364,000 warrants. This development was reported in August 2025.

More recently, Vinyas Innovative Technologies Limited announced the successful completion of a ₹150.04 crore fundraise, led by Singularity Ventures (of Madhusudan Kela) and other marquee investors, as reported on July 1, 2025.

## Company Background

Vinyas Innovative Technologies specializes in design, engineering, and electronics manufacturing services, catering to global OEMs and ODMs in the electronics sector, with printed circuit boards (PCBs) as a key product. The company is a leading EMS provider catering to global OEMs/ODMs across aerospace, defence, medical, and industrial sectors.

## Recent Performance

The company's net profit surged 26.5% to Rs 19.42 crore on a 25% rise in revenue to Rs 396.64 crore in FY25 over FY24.

Based on the search results, here's what I found about Vinyas Innovative Technologies' recent orders:

## Recent Order Wins

Vinyas Innovative Technologies received orders worth Rs. 70.16 crore, with Rs. 39.66 crore from an Indian client and Rs. 30.50 crore from a foreign client. These orders are for making PCBA parts, with the Indian order to be finished in about 6–12 months and the international one taking around 12–18 months.

Additionally, Vinyas Innovative Technologies secured purchase orders totaling ₹60.84 crore for PCBA manufacture and supply, with the domestic order of ₹32.12 crore to be executed in 6-12 months, and the international order of ₹28.72 crore in 12-18 months.

## Company Profile

Vinyas Innovative Technologies Limited (VITL), founded in 2001 and based in Mysore, is a premier Indian Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) provider specializing in end-to-end design, engineering, and manufacturing. It serves high-complexity sectors like aerospace, defense, automotive, and medical, offering PCB assembly, box builds, and turnkey solutions.

The search results don't contain specific information about orders directly from BEL or ISRO, though the company operates in the defense sector and serves government-related clients.

Based on the search results, here's information about Vinyas Innovative Technologies' order wins in 2026 related to defense and aerospace:

## Order Wins and Performance

Vinyas Innovative Technologies achieved significant order inflows of approximately INR960 crores, with an order book standing at INR1,309 crores as of March 31, 2026.

More recently, the company received new purchase orders worth ₹60.84 crore from domestic and international customers, disclosed on May 15, 2026. The domestic customer placed an order valued at ₹32.12 crore, while the international customer placed an order worth ₹28.72 crore.

## Defense and Aerospace Focus

The defense sector contributes about 85% to 90% of the company's order book, with long-term orders mainly from defense and aerospace requirements.

## Export Contribution

Exports contributed significantly to revenue, with approximately 50% of revenue coming from exports, driven by markets in Europe and the US.

## Strategic Expansion

The company expanded its customer base across aerospace, industrial, and medical sectors, and joined a joint venture with a leading Israeli defense company, strengthening its international presence.

# Vinyas Innovative Technologies Defence JV Details

**Partner:** Israel-based defence technology company

**Purpose:** "Strategic opportunities in the defence and aerospace sector" focusing on "manufacturing, assembly, system integration, maintenance, lifecycle support"

**Ownership Structure:** 26:74 equity ratio
- Vinyas Innovative Technologies: 26%
- Israel-based entity: 74%

**Investment by Vinyas:** ₹2.6 crore for equity shares at ₹10 face value per share

**Announcement Date:** May 26, 2026

**Key Details:** The arrangement involves definitive agreements including a Joint Venture and Shareholders' Agreement. It is subject to regulatory approvals and does not constitute a related party transaction, as the Israel-based company has no connections to Vinyas's promoters or promoter group.

# Vinyas Innovative Technologies Limited: ₹150 Crore Fundraise Details

**Article Date:** July 1, 2025

## Fundraise Details

**Instrument:** Warrants convertible into equity shares

**Issuance Type:** Preferential issue

**Securities Details:**
- 13,64,000 warrants issued
- Each warrant converts to 1 fully paid-up equity share (face value ₹10)

The company maintains a ₹1,018 crore order book (as of May 31, 2025) and positions itself to capitalize on India's ₹50,000 crore defence export target by 2029.

# Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd (NSE:VINYAS) - FY2026 Earnings Summary

**Release Date:** May 29, 2026

## Financial Performance

- **Revenue:** INR 518 crores
- **EBITDA:** INR 64.77 crores (12.5% margin)
- **Profit After Tax:** INR 30.87 crores
- **H2 Revenue:** Approximately INR 302 crores

## Order Book & Inflows

- **Order Inflows (FY26):** ~INR 960 crores
- **Order Book (as of March 31, 2026):** INR 1,309 crores
- **Execution Timeline:** 18-24 months
- **Defense Sector Contribution:** 85-90% of order book

## Segment Mix

- **Exports:** ~50% of revenue (Europe and US markets)
- **Domestic:** ~50% of revenue

## Capacity & Capital Expenditure

- **Current Capacity Utilization:** 35-40%
- **CapEx Invested (FY26):** INR 30 crores
- **Expected Capacity Availability:** 2-3 months post-call

## FY2027 Guidance

- **Expected Order Inflows:** 25-30% increase year-over-year
- **EBITDA Margin Guidance:** 11-12%

## Strategic Developments

- Achieved Nadcap accreditation for electronic and PCB assemblies
- Joint venture established with Israeli defense company for India manufacturing
- Wholly-owned US subsidiary incorporated
- Preferential equity raise completed: INR 150 crores

## Vinyas Innovative Technologies US Subsidiary

Vinyas Innovative Technologies has announced the incorporation of a wholly owned subsidiary, Vinyas Innovative Technologies Inc., in the United States. This strategic move is aimed at expanding the company's presence in the US market and strengthening relationships with global customers, with the subsidiary belonging to the Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS), Defense, Aerospace, and allied sectors.

The process for subscription to the share capital of the subsidiary is expected to be completed by May 2026.

## Regarding ISRO, BEL, DRDO, and HAL Orders

The search results show various defense sector contracts in 2025, but they do not contain specific information about Vinyas Innovative Technologies receiving orders from ISRO, BEL, DRDO, or HAL in 2025 with contract values. While the results mention that Vinyas Innovative gained attention after winning new orders from defence and other sectors, which may boost future growth and improve investor confidence, no specific order details or contract values from these organizations are provided in the search results.

content.text: I now have comprehensive coverage. Let me get the dates on a few remaining orders (Rs 53.74 cr, Rs 70.16 cr, US subsidiary date) to be precise.

input.prompt: Extract the Rs 53.74 crore order details: domestic vs international split, delivery timelines, and the exact announcement/article date.
Extract details about the US subsidiary: name, purpose, investment amount, and exact announcement date.

content.content:
# Vinyas Innovative Technologies US Subsidiary Details

**Subsidiary Name:** Vinyas Innovative Technologies Inc.

**Location:** United States of America

**Purpose:** The subsidiary will focus on "International business operations, customer engagement, marketing support, business development, supply chain coordination" across Electronics Manufacturing Services, Defense, and Aerospace sectors.

**Investment Amount:** Not specified in the announcement. The document only indicates that "share capital subscription is expected in May 2026," without disclosing the investment quantum.

**Announcement Date:** May 30, 2026 (updated on this date; disclosed to exchanges on May 29, 2026)

**Ownership Structure:** 100% wholly owned subsidiary

**Key Detail:** This is classified as a related party transaction under SEBI regulations, with the incorporation intimated under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

# Vinyas Innovative Technologies Order Details

**Order Value:** ₹53.74 crore

**Domestic vs International Split:** The announcement does not specify a breakdown between domestic and international portions of the order.

**Delivery Timeline:** "will be executed over the next 24 months"

**Announcement Date:** February 21, 2025, 12:21 PM IST

**Product Details:** The orders pertain to manufacturing and supplying PCBA (Printed Circuit Board Assemblies).

**Key Note:** The company confirmed these orders "were received on standard terms and conditions and do not involve any related parties," with no promoter interest in the contracts. The announcement was made under SEBI's Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements Regulations, 2015.

content.text:
I have enough to compile a comprehensive, well-dated report.

# Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd (NSE: VINYAS / BSE: 542907) — 2025-2026 Research

EMS / defense-electronics company, Mysore. All items below are officially announced/confirmed unless explicitly flagged.

## 1. New Orders / Contracts Won (2025-2026)

All disclosed as PCBA (printed circuit board assembly) manufacture/supply orders from a mix of domestic and international customers. **Customer names were NOT disclosed in any of these filings** — none of the public announcements explicitly name BEL, ISRO, DRDO, or HAL, though management says ~85-90% of the order book is defense/aerospace.

- **Rs 53.74 crore** — disclosed **Feb 21, 2025**; PCBA orders, ~24-month execution. ([businessupturn.com](https://www.businessupturn.com/business/smes/vinyas-innovative-technologies-secures-rs-53-74-crore-order-from-domestic-and-international-clients/))
- **Rs 49.42 crore** — disclosed **Jan 27, 2026**; PCBA, 6-12 month delivery; customer undisclosed. ([scanx.trade](https://scanx.trade/stock-market-news/orders-deals/vinyas-innovative-technologies-secures-49-42-crore-pcba-order-with-6-12-month-delivery-timeline/31057425))
- **Rs 60.84 crore** — disclosed **May 15, 2026**; split Rs 32.12 cr domestic (6-12 months) + Rs 28.72 cr international (12-18 months). ([scanx.trade](https://scanx.trade/stock-market-news/companies/vinyas-innovative-technologies-secures-purchase-orders-worth-60-84-crores-from-domestic-and-international-customers/40427836))
- **Rs 70.16 crore** — referenced in search (Rs 39.66 cr Indian + Rs 30.50 cr foreign); flagged as a separately reported order win, but I could not confirm the exact filing date independently. **Treat date as unconfirmed.** ([tradebrains.in](https://tradebrains.in/vinyas-innovative-and-2-other-stocks-in-focus-after-securing-orders-from-min-of-defence-others/) — note: this source was 403-blocked, so unverified)
- **Total FY26 order inflows: ~Rs 960 crore**; **order book Rs 1,309 crore as of Mar 31, 2026** (was Rs 1,018 crore as of May 31, 2025); 18-24 month execution window. ([investing.com FY26 call](https://ca.investing.com/news/company-news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nsevinyas-full-year-2026-earnings-call-highlights-strong--4672642))

## 2. Capacity Expansion

- Investing in **new SMT lines and quality upgrades**; current capacity utilization only **35-40%**, with new capacity expected to come online ~2-3 months after the May 2026 call. ([dsij.in](https://www.dsij.in/dsijarticledetail/rs-1100-crore-order-book-defence-company-to-expand-manufacturing-capacity-with-new-smt-lines-and-quality-upgrades-id001-51620))
- **Capex of Rs 30 crore invested in FY26.** ([FY26 call](https://ca.investing.com/news/company-news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nsevinyas-full-year-2026-earnings-call-highlights-strong--4672642))
- **NADCAP accreditation** (Electronics – Printed Board Assemblies) received **June 27, 2025** — aerospace-grade quality credential. ([tribuneindia.com](https://www.tribuneindia.com/news/business/vinyas-innovative-technologies-limited-successfully-raises-150-crore-and-nadcap-accreditation-for-electronics-printed-board-assemblies/))

## 3. Fundraising (CONFIRMED)

- **Rs 150.04 crore preferential allotment of 13,64,000 warrants**, completed ~**July 1, 2025**. Each warrant converts to 1 equity share (FV Rs 10); **issue price Rs 1,100/warrant**. Led by **Singularity Ventures (Madhusudan Kela)** and other investors. Use: working capital + capacity expansion. ([tribuneindia.com](https://www.tribuneindia.com/news/business/vinyas-innovative-technologies-limited-successfully-raises-150-crore-and-nadcap-accreditation-for-electronics-printed-board-assemblies/))

## 4. Corporate Actions

- **No dividends** — company has never paid one and has no stated plans. **No bonus issue or stock split** found for FY25/FY26. ([simplywall.st](https://simplywall.st/stocks/in/tech/nse-vinyas/vinyas-innovative-technologies-shares/dividend))
- The warrant preferential issue (Section 3) is the main corporate action; warrant-to-equity conversion follows the standard 18-month window.

## 5. Management Commentary / Guidance (FY26 Earnings Call, May 29, 2026)

Source: ([investing.com FY26 earnings call highlights, May 29, 2026](https://ca.investing.com/news/company-news/vinyas-innovative-technologies-ltd-nsevinyas-full-year-2026-earnings-call-highlights-strong--4672642))

- **FY26 revenue: ~Rs 518 crore** (vs Rs 396.64 cr FY25, +~31%); H2 revenue ~Rs 302 cr.
- **EBITDA Rs 64.77 cr** (12.5% margin); **PAT Rs 30.87 cr** (up ~59% YoY from ~Rs 19.42 cr FY25).
- **Mix:** ~50% exports (Europe/US), ~50% domestic; defense/aerospace 85-90% of order book.
- **FY27 guidance:** order inflows +25-30% YoY; EBITDA margin 11-12%.

## Other Strategic Developments (2026)

- **Israel defense JV** — announced **May 26, 2026**. JV with an Israel-based defense technology company for manufacturing, assembly, system integration, MRO/lifecycle support. **Ownership 26% Vinyas : 74% Israeli partner**; Vinyas investing **Rs 2.6 crore**. Subject to regulatory approvals; not a related-party transaction. ([scanx.trade](https://scanx.trade/stock-market-news/companies/vinyas-innovative-technologies-forms-jv-in-defence-sector/41317450))
- **US wholly-owned subsidiary** — "Vinyas Innovative Technologies Inc.," disclosed to exchanges **May 29, 2026**; for international business development/marketing/supply-chain in EMS, defense and aerospace. Share-capital subscription expected May 2026; investment amount not disclosed. ([scanx.trade](https://scanx.trade/stock-market-news/companies/vinyas-innovative-technologies-incorporates-wholly-owned-us-subsidiary/41708660), [businessupturn.com](https://www.businessupturn.com/business/vinyas-innovative-technologies-establishes-wholly-owned-subsidiary-in-the-usa))

## 6. Analyst / Brokerage Coverage

- Coverage is thin (recently graduated from SME segment). I found **no individual named brokerage initiation/target** from a major house in the public results.
- An **aggregated algorithmic estimate** (not a research-house view) cited a ~12-month target of ~Rs 2,140 with a "Sell" consensus. **FLAG: this is a data-aggregator/model figure, not a confirmed analyst price target** — treat as low-confidence. ([simplywall.st](https://simplywall.st/stocks/in/tech/nse-vinyas/vinyas-innovative-technologies-shares), [bitget.com](https://www.bitget.com/stock/nse-vinyas/forecast))

## Key Caveats / Flags
- **Customer identities (BEL/ISRO/DRDO/HAL) are NOT disclosed** in any order filing — defense linkage is inferred from management's segment commentary only.
- **Rs 70.16 crore order: date unverified** (primary source 403-blocked).
- **No analyst price targets from named brokerages** were found; the Rs 2,140 figure is a model aggregate, not a brokerage call.
- No QIP, rights issue, or debt raise found for 2025-2026 — the only equity raise was the Rs 150 cr warrant preferential issue.
